title: Guard integrity: close the model-param short-circuit; cli-shaped tiers deny with external-executor FIX
action: Per plan.md '2A-iii Design settled at planning (2026-07-17)' and AO5/B4/B5/W10: rewrite bee-model-guard.mjs decision order to read the declared tier BEFORE the model-param allow (today lines 123-126 short-circuit). (1) Marker+param: resolveTier 3-arg; {type:'model'} requires strict trimmed equality with the param, mismatch denies with the configured model named in FIX; tiers resolving to no model name (inherit/ceiling, budget) must not carry a param — deny, FIX says drop the param or declare the matching tier. (2) Param-only: membership check against the set of model names resolvable from claude-runtime tier slots via modelForTier (cli/null slots contribute nothing); a non-member (e.g. model:"banana", and also model:"fable" when no configured slot names fable — panel BLOCKER-1 resolution, accepted by design) denies with a FIX that lists the configured models AND teaches both escape routes: '[bee-tier: ceiling]' for a session-model dispatch, or adding the model to a configured tier slot (config is the authority — no hardcoded allowlist). Empty member set fail-opens (unconfigured repo keeps today's allow). (3) Marker-only: model/budget/inherit shapes allow as today; a cli-shaped declared tier ({type:'refused', reason:'cli_tier_gather_only'} from the 3-arg resolve) DENIES the Agent/Task dispatch with a FIX pointing at the external-executor gather path (Bash, verbatim command, prompt on stdin, resolveTier {for:'gather'}) and NEVER names a phantom model; a model-shaped review slot keeps allowing [bee-tier: review]. (4) Bare: deny as today but the FIX resolves the generation slot first — cli-shaped/null generation points at marker tiers + the external-executor path instead of 'pass model: "generation"'. Keep deny-only, fail-open on any resolution throw/unknown shape, no param rewriting, P1-1 marker anchoring untouched. Mirror .bee/bin/hooks/bee-model-guard.mjs byte-identical. Extend hooks/test_model_guard.mjs with the rows in the plan's 2A-iii cells table PLUS: a model:"fable" non-member deny row asserting the FIX teaches the ceiling-marker route, and a row pinning that [bee-tier: review] + model-param opus stays allowed while claude.review is model-shaped. The cli-shaped and malformed-config rows need NEW fixture builders the harness lacks (panel WARNING-3): add builders alongside buildDisabledFixture (test_model_guard.mjs:71 pattern) that write an explicit fixture config.json with (a) a {kind:'cli'} generation/review slot and (b) a malformed models block — new rows stage their own config, never depend on repo config values. Keep every existing row green. FINAL STEP (critical-patterns.md 'shipping a lib file means shipping the manifest'): regenerate the release manifest with node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --write, then run the full verify — --check must pass on the regenerated manifest.

truths: model:"banana" with no marker is denied and dispatch.jsonl no longer records it as a legitimate model-param transport
model:"fable" with no marker and no configured fable slot is denied; the FIX teaches [bee-tier: ceiling] as the session-model route (BLOCKER-1 accepted-by-design)
a marker+param dispatch whose param mismatches the tier's configured model is denied; the FIX names the configured model
a marker+param dispatch whose param equals the tier's configured model is allowed
a cli-shaped declared tier denies the Agent/Task dispatch; the FIX points at the external-executor gather path and contains no phantom model name
[bee-tier: review] and param-only opus stay allowed while the review slot is model-shaped (WARNING-2 pin)
bare-deny FIX under a cli-shaped generation slot names no nonexistent model
malformed or absent models config fail-opens (allow), never throws on the hook hot path
all existing marker-forgery (P1-1) rows still pass
artifacts: hooks/test_model_guard.mjs run output showing all rows green
prohibitions: no auto-injection or rewriting of the model param (deny-only guard)
no throw escaping to the hook hot path
no change to marker anchoring semantics
no hardcoded model allowlist or model ladder in the guard (config is the sole authority)
no edits outside the four bounded files (release-manifest.json only via release_manifest.mjs --write, never by hand)

verify: node hooks/test_model_guard.mjs && node hooks/test_write_guard.mjs && node hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check

trace.outcome: Guard integrity (2A-iii B4/B5/AO5): rewrote bee-model-guard decision order to read the declared tier BEFORE judging the model param. Closed the model-param short-circuit — a bare param is now membership-checked against configured claude tier slots (banana/fable deny; no hardcoded allowlist), a marker+param must strictly agree (mismatch and no-model-name+param deny), a cli-shaped declared tier denies the Agent/Task dispatch and routes to the external-executor gather path (no phantom model), and the bare-deny FIX resolves the generation slot so it never names a nonexistent model. Empty member set / malformed config fail-open. Mirror byte-identical; release manifest regenerated.
trace.verify_output: test_model_guard.mjs: ALL PASS (rows 1-32, incl. new 2A-iii rows 21-32: banana/fable non-member deny, equality match/mismatch, ceiling+param deny, WARNING-2 review pin, marker-only allow, cli-tier deny w/ external FIX + no phantom model, bare-cli-generation FIX names no model, empty-member-set fail-open allow, malformed-config no-throw; existing marker-forgery P1-1 rows 7/7b/7c green). test_write_guard.mjs: PASS. test_hook_contracts.mjs: PASS. release_manifest.mjs --check: PASS (142 files, regenerated via --write after guard hash change). Chain exit 0.
trace.verify_command: node hooks/test_model_guard.mjs && node hooks/test_write_guard.mjs && node hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check
